'''rachotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pwnership|pwnership]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ch-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pwnership|pwnership]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rachotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || ræchetheth || ræchethej || ræchethesh || ræchethe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || rachochothoth || rachochothoj || rachochothosh || rachochotho
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || rachothoth || rachothoj || rachothosh || rachotho
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || rachofthofth || rachofthofj || rachofthofsh || rachofthof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || rachothotho || rachothojo || rachothosho || rachothoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || rachothoth || rachothoj || rachothosh || rachotho
|-
| [[Possessive]] || rachothothol || rachothojol || rachothoshol || rachothokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || rachothoothotho || rachothoojojo || rachothooshosho || rachothooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || rachothothon || rachothojon || rachothoshon || rachothokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || rachothothooro || rachothojooro || rachothoshooro || rachothokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
